---
layout: default
title: "Rajya Sabha Oaths and Legislative Debates"
date: 2026-06-29T17:16:55.161185+00:00
summary: "Eight new members join the Rajya Sabha as Parliament debates key constitutional amendments and the opposition demands the resignation of the Defence Minister"
run_time_ist: "10:46PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:46PM</p>


## India National Politics

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Rajya Sabha expansion:</strong> Eight new members were sworn into the Rajya Sabha, including the reappointment of Mallikarjun Kharge as Leader of the Opposition, while the BJP&#x27;s strength in the upper house rose to 114.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxQQU9KNDlzRkVEc1ItS2g3SHFCV3hzZWxoNGcwdkJjcGdmSlhxdVJOdG9VYmRGZ1BEUW1FVno3MGkwSlNBak1Jdjc0UEhyZ2hhUUw2M0lGcmpqREs2Zm9BQ2NfRmt2S01tQ0NqMFNMWGQ1WWtrdU8ycC1zRU5CT0ZDR0dfRzgtemE3cGxxUlJ1eGQ4Y25VZTBtXzJ5QXQzaHU3d25xZk85UTZER1k?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Supreme Court ruling:</strong> The Supreme Court rejected Meenakshi Natarajan&#x27;s nomination to the Rajya Sabha.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxPX3llRnJYUkhmY2tWVmZXR0hHcXJyS2Vqd0Q1MXJ5Tm9tekI1ejE0MmdFcG9wQ1ZpMkg4SENHZm5obTBpSTJXY1otTTYwNHczQWZ5aXB0MW5DanJFZXh2bGppZFNuMFozcG5STEwyTFBYV3d1a2JtNGxCU3BZcXBIeHJmN3h6UHpaQU5qYVZoSFRTemp1NVYxWW5HdTJDWi1RYWFLMFRNODhULUdZN3BTTQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Parliamentary proceedings:</strong> Home Minister Amit Shah intervened in Lok Sabha discussions regarding the Delimitation Bill, the Constitution (131st Amendment) Bill, and the Union Territories Laws (Amendment) Bill.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifEFVX3lxTE5NUmxlOFYxbkc2bWdTWkJmUjZYb0otV2c5VGVld2poazVEVGlRdWJjUjFmT181cFg5Nnc1VXRnZ3BWOVNjQzd2TWkxYndybkNxdnVjZGs0UmtsODlDVmpEYVMwZmVhZDJRanprU0R0bDllbW0yUm1hZ1lyXzk?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a></span></li>
</ul>

## Policy and Institutions

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Opposition protest:</strong> The Congress party has demanded the resignation of Defence Minister Rajnath Singh following his controversial remarks regarding &#x27;Operation Sindoor&#x27; in Parliament.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Delhi EV policy:</strong> The upcoming Delhi EV policy, set to launch on July 1, is being positioned as a national benchmark for electric vehicle adoption despite criticism from some political quarters regarding its long-term sustainability.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a></span></li>
</ul>
